title: Unsupported SystemVerilog when inferring BRAM on FPGA

features.name: delayed assignment to array inside for loop
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment (<=) to an unpacked array element inside a for loop
features.snippet:
logic [7:0] ram[0:15]; logic [7:0] data; int addr;
always @(posedge clk) for (int i=0; i<16; i++) ram[addr][i] <= data[i*8+:8];

features.name: 2D unpacked array for BRAM with byte enable
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array with byte lanes suitable for BRAM inference with byte-enable support

features.name: indexed part select with loop variable
features.description: Code should include an indexed part select operation using a loop variable as the base index
